name: FIELD BREAKING
short_description: Outsmart your opponent and emerge victorious in a thrilling game FIELD BREAKING!
detailed_description:
Get ready for a new era of board games.
In this highly strategic game you need to break the field. The one whose course will collapse the statue - lost!


Artificial intelligence presented in this game-one of the best in the world.
AI adapts to your play style, which makes the game not predictable.
So if you are not a world champion in Field Breaking, you can easily seem cornered.
This Board strategic puzzle game we recommend to children and adults.

Features:

  • Supports up to 8 players online.
  • Full customization.
  • Compete with other players!
  • Realistic physics.
  • Develop strategic thinking.
